meta.convention: delta=radius (ABF). EXACT distance via full codeword enumeration; ALL gamma in F enumerated per line. Line counts tiered by cost (q^k*q*n) and logged per cell.
meta.note_GF2_7: GF(2^7)* has prime order 127 -> NO proper multiplicative subgroup, so it yields no smooth proper-subgroup cell.
meta.note_GF1031: GF(1031) cells excluded: exact all-gamma distance costs ~21 s/line over its 1031 scalars (cost q^k*q*n > 2e9), too slow for a meaningful line sample. q=521 already probes n/|F| down to ~0.01.

sampling.full_line_space_size: q^(2n) (lines sampled; gamma fully enumerated = q/line)
